understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`), completing levels within the allowed attempts and turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (`MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT`) or a `CLICK` on a specific grid coordinate to remove a clickable/breakable tile (`x`). After any horizontal move, gravity (here DOWN) automatically carries the player until they land on a solid/support tile (`o`/`m`/`w`), hit the goal, or land on a hazard; landing on spikes ends the attempt immediately. `UNDO` can revert the previous action. Clicks do not move the player; they modify the map to open or block fall paths for subsequent moves.
